title: Add agent prompting norms for saving research to knowledge repo

comments.author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--knowledge-norms
comments.content: Plan: 1) Create new rule file crosslink/resources/crosslink/rules/knowledge.md with knowledge management instructions. 2) Register it in build.rs (rerun-if-changed) and init.rs (include_str + RULE_FILES array). 3) Update kickoff.md template to add knowledge search/save instructions to child agent prompts. 4) Update session-start.py to display knowledge page count on session start. All changes are to resource templates so crosslink init propagates them.
